author: François Chalifour
subject: feat(sffv): Use client SFFV over index SFFV (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#572)
body:
* feat(sffv): Use `client.sffv()` if available
* test(sffv): Test usage of `client.sffv()` over `client.index.sffv()`
* fix(sffv): Pass correct format to `client.sffv()`
* test(sffv): Add tests with state for SFFV
* test(sffv): Update client SFFV test
